extension.summary: Stream radio from DI.FM, JazzRadio, RadioTunes, RockRadio, ClassicalRadio, and Zen Radio
Streame Radio von DI.FM, JazzRadio, RadioTunes, RockRadio, ClassicalRadio und Zen Radio
extension.description: All-in-one AudioAddict streaming radio plugin. Browse and play channels from all six AudioAddict networks: DI.FM (electronic), JazzRadio, RadioTunes, RockRadio, ClassicalRadio, and Zen Radio. Supports free and premium streams with quality selection up to 320kbps MP3. Features: channel browsing by genre, favorites, now-playing info with album art.

All-in-One AudioAddict Streaming-Radio-Plugin. Durchsuche und spiele Channels von allen sechs AudioAddict-Netzwerken: DI.FM (Electronic), JazzRadio, RadioTunes, RockRadio, ClassicalRadio und Zen Radio. Unterstützt kostenlose und Premium-Streams mit Qualitätsauswahl bis 320kbps MP3.
